title: taraxacum stenacrum
intro: Taraxacum stenacrum, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum, characterized by its narrow, pointed leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate liver function and improve digestion, due to its high content of taraxasterol and other sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Taraxacum stenacrum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum stenacrum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its roots and leaves can also be dried and used in capsules or powder form.
